response: TechNova is aware of the data breach affecting customer records. We have immediately engaged our cybersecurity team to contain the breach and protect all affected customers. We are cooperating with law enforcement and will provide regular updates as the investigation progresses.

response: The executive misconduct allegation is being taken extremely seriously. We have immediately suspended the executive pending a full independent investigation. We are committed to full transparency and accountability throughout this process.
